response.global_analysis: 1. JSON Match: Highly aligned with both reference lyrics and on-screen burnt-in subtitles. 2. JSON Usage: Fully integrated, leveraging on-screen lyrics for accurate transcriptions of rapid-fire hip-hop phrases and special characters (e.g., '#%&$'~='). 3. Timing & Pacing: Timed intro loops continuously to match the vocal cadence, left a silent gap during the mid-song transition, and resumed precise, syllable-anchored timings for the main track to avoid any cascading delays.

subtitles.english: Petals dance and fall, memories flutter back

subtitles.original: 花びら舞い散る
subtitles.english: Petals dance and fall...

subtitles.original: 人はこれって時にどうしても
subtitles.english: When things like this happen, people always

subtitles.original: 「時間を戻せたら」とかいうね
subtitles.english: say, "If only I could turn back time."

subtitles.original: でも誰も直せないよ 治せないんだな
subtitles.english: But nobody can fix it, it can't be healed.

subtitles.original: 昔からそうだし まぁしょうがないね
subtitles.english: It's been like that since the old days, well, it can't be helped.

subtitles.original: きっと先は深くて不安定
subtitles.english: I'm sure the future ahead is deep and uncertain,

subtitles.original: でもお行儀よくちゃつまんないね
subtitles.english: but being well-behaved is just boring.

subtitles.original: タイムマシーンに乗り込んで
subtitles.english: If I could ride a time machine,

subtitles.original: トラベラーになれたら
subtitles.english: and become a traveler.

subtitles.original: 箱の中の猫を思っても
subtitles.english: Even if I think about the cat in the box,

subtitles.original: 後悔だけが胸を焦がして
subtitles.english: only regret burns in my chest,

subtitles.original: いつもあの猜疑心が遮るんだわ
subtitles.english: and that suspicion always gets in the way.

subtitles.original: 昔からそうだし まぁしょうがないね
subtitles.english: It's been like that since the old days, well, it can't be helped.

subtitles.original: きっと先は深くて不安定
subtitles.english: I'm sure the future ahead is deep and uncertain,

subtitles.original: でもお行儀よくちゃつまんないね
subtitles.english: but being well-behaved is just boring.

subtitles.original: タイムマシーンに乗り込んで
subtitles.english: If I could ride a time machine,

subtitles.original: トラベラーになれたら
subtitles.english: and become a traveler.

subtitles.original: どこをどうやってもね
subtitles.english: No matter what I do or how I try,

subtitles.original: 時間ってのは戻せない
subtitles.english: you can't turn back time.

subtitles.original: レンズ越し未来にめがけて
subtitles.english: Aiming through the lens at the future,

subtitles.original: ピースサイン伝えてる
subtitles.english: sending a peace sign,

subtitles.original: 今のとこいい調子
subtitles.english: so far, things are going well.

subtitles.original: 青春の1ページも
subtitles.english: Even a single page of youth,

subtitles.original: たったの1ページで
subtitles.english: is just a single page,

subtitles.original: 自慢の人生のハイライトも
subtitles.english: and even the highlights of my proud life

subtitles.original: 一夜きりのTweetの buzz みたい
subtitles.english: are like a one-night viral tweet.

subtitles.original: 君と出会った日のことを覚えてるよ
subtitles.english: I remember the day I met you,

subtitles.original: イヤフォン垂らして この曲をきいていたよ
subtitles.english: with my earphones dangling, listening to this song.

subtitles.original: あれから数えて今日は何年目！？
subtitles.english: Counting from then, what year is this today?!

subtitles.original: 今じゃ足跡
subtitles.english: Now that footprints

subtitles.original: どこも残るから これは歌詞カード
subtitles.english: are left everywhere, this is a lyric card.

subtitles.original: 載せす鍵かけておこう ＃％＆＄'~＝
subtitles.english: Let's keep it locked up and unposted, #%&$'~=

subtitles.original: ほらね、聴き取れない！！
subtitles.english: See, you can't hear it!!

subtitles.original: 皆いつもくよくよ悩み
subtitles.english: Everyone always frets and worries,

subtitles.original: 締め切りに追われ歴史を作り
subtitles.english: making history while chased by deadlines,

subtitles.original: 弱さを無理やり ごまかし
subtitles.english: forcing ourselves to cover up our weaknesses.

subtitles.original: 君の芝生は緑 青じゃなくていい
subtitles.english: Your lawn is green, it doesn't have to be blue.

subtitles.original: アイドル撮られちゃった真冬の空に
subtitles.english: An idol got caught under the midwinter sky,

subtitles.original: 政治家ぶれてブレちゃった帰り道
subtitles.english: politicians wavered and blurred on the way home.

subtitles.original: とうちゃんローン組んだ みはてぬ先
subtitles.english: Dad took out a loan for an endless future,

subtitles.original: でも時は全部を流して
subtitles.english: but time washes everything away.

subtitles.original: 人はこれって時にどうしても
subtitles.english: When things like this happen, people always

subtitles.original: 「時間を戻せたら」とかいうね
subtitles.english: say, 'If only I could turn back time.'

subtitles.original: 物理的な仕組みを直せないんだな
subtitles.english: But nobody can fix it, it can't be healed.

subtitles.original: 昔からそうだし まぁしょうがないね
subtitles.english: It's been like that since the old days, well, it can't be helped.

subtitles.original: きっと先は深くて不安定
subtitles.english: I'm sure the future ahead is deep and uncertain,

subtitles.original: でもお行儀よくちゃつまんないね
subtitles.english: but being well-behaved is just boring.

subtitles.original: タイムマシーンに乗り込んで
subtitles.english: If I could ride a time machine,

subtitles.original: トラベラーになれたら
subtitles.english: and become a traveler.

subtitles.original: 俺ってやつはいつも気づいた時は手遅れ
subtitles.english: A guy like me is always too late by the time he realizes,

subtitles.original: 絵空事ばかりうつつ抜かして
subtitles.english: constantly infatuated with nothing but fantasies,

subtitles.original: 大事な人すら救えない
subtitles.english: unable to even save the people precious to me.

subtitles.original: だからこんな歌で自分に言い聞かして
subtitles.english: That's why I lecture myself with a song like this,

subtitles.original: あの時あいつは多分気を使って
subtitles.english: back then, he was probably trying to be considerate,

subtitles.original: とくに顔色変えず何も無い振り
subtitles.english: without changing his expression, pretending nothing happened.

subtitles.original: なんで言わないんだってムカついてもね
subtitles.english: Even if I get annoyed wondering why he didn't say anything,

subtitles.original: やさしさからきてたならしょうがないね
subtitles.english: if it came from kindness, well, it can't be helped.

subtitles.original: 願わくばディスコで
subtitles.english: If possible, at the disco

subtitles.original: 親父と母さんが会った日に行きたいね
subtitles.english: on the day my dad and mom first met.

subtitles.original: 後ろのジョックスに酒かけて
subtitles.english: Splashing drinks on the jocks in the back,

subtitles.original: 息子じきじきにチャンス作ってやるぜ
subtitles.english: as their son, I'll personally create a chance for them.

subtitles.original: どんなでかい時計だってすべてさ
subtitles.english: No matter how huge a clock is, everything

subtitles.original: 始まりはこんな小さい歯車
subtitles.english: starts with a tiny gear like this.

subtitles.original: 細かいことはもういいや 疲れた
subtitles.english: I'm done with the small details, I'm tired.

subtitles.original: 別に怒ってないってさ未来は
subtitles.english: I'm not really angry, you know, the future is...

subtitles.original: 人はこれって時にどうしても
subtitles.english: When things like this happen, people always

subtitles.original: 「時間を戻せたら」とかいうね
subtitles.english: say, 'If only I could turn back time.'

subtitles.original: でも誰も直せないよ 治せないんだな
subtitles.english: But nobody can fix it, it can't be healed.

subtitles.original: 昔からそうだし まぁしょうがないね
subtitles.english: It's been like that since the old days, well, it can't be helped.
